name: QR Code Generator
shortDesc: Instantly generate high-quality QR codes for any text, URL, or data payload.
description: The QR Code API dynamically generates a scannable PNG image. Perfect for event ticketing, marketing materials, digital menus, or vCards. Returns raw binary image data that can be displayed directly in web apps.

params.name: data
params.desc: The text or URL to encode in the QR code.

params.name: size
params.desc: Dimensions of the QR code (e.g. '300x300'). Default is 300x300.

responseExample: Returns a raw image/png binary blob.
howItWorks: You send the payload you want encoded (like a website URL).
Our rendering engine instantly generates the matrix code pattern.
The API streams a high-resolution PNG image directly back to your client.
useCases: Generating digital tickets or boarding passes
Linking physical products to digital manuals
